title: Constitutional Self-Discovery Loop — FailurePatternMiner + InvariantCandidateProposer + InvariantRatificationGate

invariants_introduced.description: No auto-discovered invariant enters constitution.yaml without HUMAN-0 ratification
DEVADAAD generates and presents; governor decides and patches
Clustering is deterministic — identical rejection corpora produce identical clusters
Candidate IDs are stable and deterministic from cluster_id
All candidates are disabled (enabled=False) until HUMAN-0 ratification
Same cluster produces same candidate_id — idempotent
Only clusters meeting MIN_CLUSTER_FREQUENCY are proposed
Mining is strictly read-only — ledger never modified
Every ratification decision produces a RatificationRecord with evidence_digest
Ratification records are deterministically replayable from their evidence digest

human_gate_actions: Review InvariantRatificationGate.present_batch() output on live ledger
Call ratify(candidate, verdict='approve'|'reject') for each candidate
Manually apply yaml_patch to runtime/governance/constitution.yaml for approved candidates
Commit with: governance(phase81): ratify invariant {invariant_id} — CSDL-0
novelty: First constitutionally-governed system with autonomous invariant discovery from its own governance history. No prior art in production code evolution systems.
